creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
update to patchlevel 25:

diff -ruN bash.orig/Makefile bash/Makefile
--- bash.orig/Makefile  Mon Sep 10 03:34:21 2007
+++ bash/Makefile       Mon Sep 10 04:38:19 2007
@@ -7,9 +7,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=              bash
-PATCHLEVEL=            17
+PATCHLEVEL=            25
 PORTVERSION=           3.2.${PATCHLEVEL:S/^0//g}
-PORTREVISION?=         2
+PORTREVISION?=         0
 CATEGORIES=            shells
 MASTER_SITES=          ${MASTER_SITE_GNU:S/$/:bash/} \
                        ftp://ftp.cwru.edu/pub/%SUBDIR%/:faq
diff -ruN bash.orig/distinfo bash/distinfo
--- bash.orig/distinfo  Mon Sep 10 03:34:29 2007
+++ bash/distinfo       Mon Sep 10 03:55:30 2007
@@ -52,5 +52,29 @@
